examples: Every time I sing that line, I have to compete with that darn trombone!
You could darn our clothes, and make pockets for us.
Does Mother imagine that she is going to darn all those stockings knotted up on the quilt like a coil of snakes?
Finally, Apple gadgets are so darn expensive for India. 95% of the populace cannot afford it.
Lesson: when you want to complain about someone, pick up the gosh darn phone.
